metadata.description: Ono internal AI Marketplace — Claude Code plugins built and maintained by Ono Apps.

plugins.name: ono-project-inspector
plugins.description: Inspects an existing software repository and gradually builds a structured, approval-gated AI knowledge base for it (CLAUDE.md, AUDIT.md, docs/project/, and per-topic audit documents), then syncs approved findings back into CLAUDE.md. Never modifies source code.
